description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The front facade is accented with a wood-textured panel and large, vertically oriented windows that provide ample natural light. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly to create a covered entryway or carport area. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some variation on the sides and rear for privacy and light control. The exterior walls are predominantly white, contrasting with the wood paneling and dark window frames. The main entryway is recessed beneath the upper story, offering shelter and a sense of depth to the entrance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, wood panel accents, and large vertical windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-accented facade, large vertical windows, and a recessed entryway beneath the upper story.
description_view_1: Left side view with minimal window openings and a solid white wall, highlighting the house's boxy shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide, flat wall with several windows and a large, open area at the base, possibly for a patio or garage.
description_view_3: Right side view with a mix of window sizes and a visible overhang, emphasizing the modern, geometric design.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with vertical strips on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath upper story, sheltered by overhang, with large glass door and no visible steps or porch
